name: Breakfast Fruit Chimichangas
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the apricot basting sauce; set aside.
2. Heat oven to 500 degrees F.
3. Mix cream cheese, ricotta cheese, sugar, and orange peel thoroughly in a bowl.
4. Spoon about 1/4 cup of the mixture into the center of each tortilla.
5. Top with 1 Tbsp of preserves on each tortilla.
6. Fold one end of the tortilla up about 1-inch over the mixture.
7. Fold in the right and left sides over the folded end, then fold the remaining side to overlap the others.
8. Brush the edges of each chimichanga with egg to seal them.
9. Brush each chimichanga with margarine.
10. Place seam sides down on an ungreased jelly roll pan (15 1/2 X 10 1/2 X 1-inch).
11. Bake until the chimichangas begin to brown and are hot, about 8 to 10 minutes.
12. Serve with apricots and apricot basting sauce.
